Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to be performed after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in variants that include a rejection loop
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in cases where no intermediate approval occurs
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to be done compared to the average time of Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in variants that restart the process with a new submission
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING across all process instances
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in domestic declaration cases versus pre-paid travel cost cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by MISSING after the last approval step
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in rejected-only variants (i.e., variants ending in a rejection without payment)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by MISSING after the execution of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to the subsequent Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in rework loops
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in cases involving only supervisor-level approval (no budget owner or pre-approver)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case
